zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville於1464年出生在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，她的父親Sir James Baskerville28歲，母親Sibyl Devereux24歲。她與Watkin Vaughan II結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1546年在英國賀福爾特尼--也享年82歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville于1464年出生在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，她的父亲Sir James Baskerville28岁，母亲Sibyl Devereux24岁。她与Watkin Vaughan II结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1546年在英国賀福爾特尼--也享年82岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

nameMeanings.name: aka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville was born in 1464, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir James Baskerville, was 28 and her mother, Sibyl Devereux, was 24. She married Watkin Vaughan II. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1546, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville est née en 1464, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Baskerville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Devereux, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Watkin Vaughan II. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1546, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville 1464 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Baskerville 28 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Devereux 24. Sie hat Watkin Vaughan II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1546 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville è nata il nel 1464 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir James Baskerville, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Sibyl Devereux, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Watkin Vaughan II. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1546, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskervilleが1464年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Sir James Baskervilleは28歳，母Sibyl Devereuxは24歳であった。Watkin Vaughan IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1546年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイで82歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville(이)가 1464년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Baskerville(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Devereux(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Watkin Vaughan II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1546년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville nasceu em 1464, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Baskerville, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Devereux, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Watkin Vaughan II. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1546, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville родилась в 1464 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Baskerville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Devereux, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Watkin Vaughan II. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1546 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville nació en 1464, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James Baskerville, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sibyl Devereux, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Watkin Vaughan II. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1546, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
